---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for TalentFlow CLI
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Is your request related to a limitation you hit?

## Proposed solution

Describe the command, flag, or behavior you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Portability check

Would this feature require native compilation, heavy binaries, or
platform-specific code? TalentFlow must keep working in Android/Termux.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, example output, related tools.
